chapter_title.ar: باب تَقْدِيمِ النَّوَافِلِ وَ تَأْخِيرِهَا وَ قَضَائِهَا وَ صَلَاةِ الضُّحَى
chapter_title.en: Chapter 85 – Preceding the optional (Salāt) and delaying it, and its payback, and the Salāt at forenoon

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/420)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/420)
text: قَالَ اعْلَمْ أَنَّ النَّافِلَةَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ الْهَدِيَّةِ مَتَى مَا أُتِيَ بِهَا قُبِلَتْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Amro Bin Usman, from Muhammad Bin Uzafir, from Umar Bin Yazeed,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Know, that the optional (Salāt) is at the status of a gift. Whenever one comes up with it, is Accepted’.
en.sarwar: 14. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ‘Amr ibn ‘Uthman from Muhammad ibn ‘Adhafir from ‘Umar ibn Yazid who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Optional Salah (prayer) is like present; whenever given is accepted.’”
